failure_reason: Added optional BMF choice receipt wrappers and a focused sibling-kernel proof. Initial test parse failed due an extra closing paren; fixed and reran focused source and binary proofs to pass at 67108863. Full form validation still reports 7 pre-existing divergences outside this change, while the new receipt band passes in discovery. Performance medians show existing BMF/BML compiler hot-path bands are effectively flat; receipt construction is opt-in.
